# cloudless_subnet (Resource)

A subnet inside a Fluence VPC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudless_subnet" "private" {
  vpc_id    = cloudless_vpc.main.id
  name      = "private"
  ipv4_cidr = "10.0.0.0/24"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String) Parent VPC.

### Optional

- `cluster_id` (String) Cluster the subnet lives on. If unset, derived from vpc_id's cluster.
- `ipv4_cidr` (String) Optional IPv4 CIDR (e.g. 10.0.0.0/24).
- `ipv6_cidr` (String) Optional IPv6 CIDR (e.g. 2001:db8::/64).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
